privileged_info_summary: The task 'add_document_tag@1' is a Nuxeo Platform 10.10 document tagging task. It uses real Nuxeo infrastructure (verified version exists on Docker Hub) with PostgreSQL 11 database running on port 8080. The task requires adding the tag 'finance' to the document 'Annual Report 2023' in the Projects workspace at path /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Annual-Report-2023. The document data is synthetic (generated with ReportLab) but contains realistic ACME Corporation content. The verifier queries the @tags endpoint to confirm tag application. Standard Administrator credentials are used throughout. No privileged information metadata field exists in task.json.
